diagrams.title: Fundamental Circuit Formation
diagrams.description: Shows how adding a chord to a spanning tree creates a fundamental circuit
elements: Unique tree path between chord endpoints
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how each chord creates one fundamental circuit by connecting two tree vertices

diagrams.title: Cycle Space Basis
diagrams.description: Multiple fundamental circuits shown as basis vectors spanning the cycle space
diagrams.purpose: Understand that fundamental circuits form a basis and can combine to create any cycle

diagrams.title: Tree-Chord-Circuit Relationship
diagrams.description: Tree with chords and corresponding fundamental circuits highlighted
diagrams.purpose: Show one-to-one correspondence between chords and fundamental circuits

diagrams.title: Rank Nullity Decomposition
diagrams.description: Graph decomposition showing tree edges (rank) and chords (nullity)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize that m = rank + nullity = tree edges + chords
